# @melvillian/openai-summarizer

## Overview

OpenAI integration package for text summarization. Uses Zod for schema validation and dotenv for config.

## Commands

- `bun run build` - Compile TypeScript
- `bun run dev` - Watch mode compilation
- `bun run typecheck` - Type check without emitting

## Dependencies

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED - DO NOT EDIT -->

- **dotenv** (^16.4.5) - Environment variable loading
- **openai** (^6.9.1) - OpenAI API client
- **zod** (^3.22.4) - Schema validation

## Auto-Update Instructions

After changes to files in this directory, run `/update-claude-md`.
